title: Cultural Triangle Explorer
description: Journey through Sri Lanka's ancient kingdoms — UNESCO World Heritage sites, sacred temples, and royal palaces set against lush jungle backdrops.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Colombo
itinerary.desc: Welcome meet & greet at BIA airport. Transfer to hotel. Evening city tour of Colombo's colonial landmarks, Galle Face Green sunset stroll and welcome dinner.

itinerary.title: Colombo → Sigiriya
itinerary.desc: Morning drive to Sigiriya (4 hrs). Afternoon climb the iconic Lion Rock Fortress — 1,200 steps to panoramic views. Explore the royal gardens and frescoes.

itinerary.title: Dambulla Cave Temple & Village Life
itinerary.desc: Morning visit to the 2,000-year-old Dambulla Cave Temple with 157 statues of the Buddha. Afternoon village cycling tour and spice garden visit.

itinerary.title: Polonnaruwa Ancient City
itinerary.desc: Full-day exploration of the medieval capital by bicycle. Visit the Gal Vihara rock sculptures, Royal Palace complex, and Parakrama Samudra reservoir.

itinerary.title: Anuradhapura Sacred City
itinerary.desc: Sri Lanka's first ancient capital. Visit the sacred Sri Maha Bodhi tree, Ruwanwelisaya Stupa, Thuparamaya, and the Twin Ponds.

itinerary.title: Kandy — The Last Kingdom
itinerary.desc: Drive to Kandy via Matale spice gardens. Afternoon at the Temple of the Tooth Relic. Evening cultural dance performance.

itinerary.title: Kandy → Departure
itinerary.desc: Morning free to explore Kandy markets. Transfer to airport for departure.

title: Southern Beach Paradise
description: Turquoise waters, whale watching at dawn, colonial Galle Fort, and leopard safaris — Sri Lanka's south coast is nothing short of magical.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Colombo City Tour
itinerary.desc: Airport pickup and evening Colombo city highlights tour. Seafood welcome dinner.

itinerary.title: Colombo → Galle Fort
itinerary.desc: Scenic coastal drive to UNESCO-listed Galle Fort. Walk the ramparts at sunset, explore Dutch colonial streets.

itinerary.title: Unawatuna Beach Day
itinerary.desc: Relax on the crescent beach of Unawatuna — snorkelling the reef, kayaking, and a sunset cocktail at a clifftop bar.

itinerary.title: Mirissa — Whale Watching
itinerary.desc: Pre-dawn departure for whale watching (blue whales & sperm whales). Afternoon beach free time. Turtle hatchery visit.

itinerary.title: Tangalle Secret Beaches
itinerary.desc: Discover hidden coves of Tangalle. Visit Rekawa Lagoon at dusk for nesting sea turtle observation.

itinerary.title: Yala National Park Safari
itinerary.desc: Two jeep safaris — morning and late afternoon — in Sri Lanka's premier wildlife reserve. Leopards, elephants, crocodiles.

itinerary.title: Tissamaharama & Kataragama
itinerary.desc: Visit the sacred Kataragama temple complex. Evening at leisure. Traditional southern Sri Lankan dinner.

itinerary.title: Return to Colombo
itinerary.desc: Scenic coastal highway return. Airport transfer. Farewell.

title: Hill Country Tea Trail
description: Mist-draped mountains, endless tea plantations, waterfalls, and the iconic Ella Rock sunrise — Sri Lanka's highlands at their most breathtaking.

itinerary.title: Kandy → Nuwara Eliya by Train
itinerary.desc: Board the famous blue train from Kandy — one of the world's most scenic rail journeys. Arrive at Nuwara Eliya 'Little England'.

itinerary.title: Tea Estate & Horton Plains
itinerary.desc: Morning tea factory tour and tea plucking experience. Afternoon hike at Horton Plains to World's End — a sheer 870m precipice.

itinerary.title: Nuwara Eliya → Ella
itinerary.desc: Continue by scenic train to Ella. Nine Arch Bridge photography stop. Afternoon leisure in charming Ella village.

itinerary.title: Ella Rock Sunrise Hike
itinerary.desc: Pre-dawn hike to Ella Rock summit for sunrise over the hills. Little Adam's Peak afternoon walk. Ravana Falls swim.

itinerary.title: Ella → Colombo
itinerary.desc: Morning at leisure. Transfer to Colombo. Airport drop-off or hotel check-in.

title: Wildlife Safari Adventure
description: Sri Lanka packs more leopards per square kilometre than almost anywhere on Earth. This safari circuit takes you through the finest wildlife reserves.

itinerary.title: Colombo → Udawalawe
itinerary.desc: Drive to Udawalawe National Park (4 hrs). Evening game drive — the park is famous for large elephant herds, often 100+ individuals.

itinerary.title: Udawalawe Full Day Safaris
itinerary.desc: Morning and afternoon jeep safaris. Elephant Transit Home visit — a sanctuary rehabilitating orphaned elephants.

itinerary.title: Udawalawe → Yala
itinerary.desc: Transfer to Yala. Afternoon safari in Block 1 — highest leopard density globally. Spot sloth bears, crocodiles, water buffaloes.

itinerary.title: Yala National Park
itinerary.desc: Two full game drives. Optional birdwatching at Bundala wetlands — 200+ bird species including greater flamingo.

itinerary.title: Sinharaja Rainforest Trek
itinerary.desc: UNESCO World Heritage rainforest trek with a specialist naturalist guide. Purple-faced langurs, blue magpies, endemic amphibians.

itinerary.title: Galle & Departure
itinerary.desc: Morning at Galle Fort. Afternoon coastal drive back to Colombo airport.

title: Heritage & Temples Deep Dive
description: A deeply immersive journey into Sri Lanka's Buddhist and Hindu spiritual heritage — from rock-cut monasteries to living pilgrimage sites.

itinerary.title: Colombo & Kelaniya Temple
itinerary.desc: Arrival and visit to Kelaniya Raja Maha Vihara — where the Buddha is said to have visited. Evening cultural briefing dinner.

itinerary.title: Colombo Heritage Walk
itinerary.desc: Old Town heritage walk: Wolfendahl Church, Pettah bazaars, Grand Mosque, Old Parliament, and the National Museum.

itinerary.title: Kandy
itinerary.desc: Travel to Kandy. Temple of the Tooth morning puja ceremony. Afternoon at the Royal Botanical Gardens, Peradeniya.

itinerary.title: Kandy's Hidden Temples
itinerary.desc: Gadaladeniya, Lankathilaka, and Embekka Devale — three extraordinary 14th-century temples.

itinerary.title: Matale & Aluvihara
itinerary.desc: Rock cave temple of Aluvihara where the Pali Canon was first written. Matale spice garden tour.

itinerary.title: Adam's Peak Pilgrimage
itinerary.desc: Night hike (2,243m) to Sri Pada — Sri Lanka's most sacred mountain, revered by all major religions. Summit sunrise is otherworldly.

itinerary.title: Recovery & Ratnapura Gems
itinerary.desc: Rest day after the night hike. Afternoon visit Ratnapura gem mines — Sri Lanka is the world's gem capital.

itinerary.title: Southern Heritage
itinerary.desc: Galle Fort UNESCO site. Weligama Bay. Mulgirigala Rock Temple carved into a massive boulder.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Return to Colombo. Last minute shopping at Barefoot Gallery. Airport transfer.

title: Adventure & Surf Circuit
description: Surf legendary Arugam Bay, raft the Kelani River rapids, trek the wild Knuckles Range, and kite-surf the Kalpitiya lagoon.

itinerary.title: Colombo → Kitulgala
itinerary.desc: Drive to Kitulgala (3 hrs). Afternoon white water rafting on the Kelani River — Grade 2–4 rapids through jungle gorges.

itinerary.title: Knuckles Mountain Range
itinerary.desc: Full-day guided trek through the biodiverse Knuckles Range (UNESCO). Cloud forests, cardamom plantations, and remote village.

itinerary.title: Knuckles → Arugam Bay
itinerary.desc: Long drive to Sri Lanka's east coast surf mecca. Beach arrival, board rental, sunset swim.

itinerary.title: Arugam Bay Surf Day 1
itinerary.desc: Morning surf lesson at Arugam Bay main point — one of Asia's top 10 surf spots. Afternoon at Pottuvil Lagoon.

itinerary.title: Arugam Bay Surf Day 2
itinerary.desc: Explore Peanut Farm and Elephant Rock surf breaks. Afternoon trip to Kumana National Park.

itinerary.title: Kalpitiya Kite Surfing
itinerary.desc: Drive to Kalpitiya lagoon — perfect flat water for kite-surfing. Lesson and equipment provided. Dolphin watching at dawn.

itinerary.title: Colombo & Departure
itinerary.desc: Morning return to Colombo. Time for last-minute shopping in Pettah Market. Airport transfer.
